content.en:
"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian had guessed before that he might be targeted by trading the Eternal Fire Vine, although the probability was very low, but Bei Longze's reputation was not very good, and he might really do it.

Unexpectedly, they actually came.

This gave Ye Tian a new understanding of Bei Longze's character and reputation, and it is estimated that the information he inquired about was still euphemistically described.

Six half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, maybe other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses would be afraid, but he was not afraid.

How terrifying his foundation was, he had cultivated a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and then solidified it.

And he has been cultivating the Ruin Sun Solidification Technique for a period of time, and the degree of solidification of the Eternal Dao Seed has improved a lot.

Now, his strength is extremely strong, not to mention the six half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, even if the number is doubled, he is not afraid.

And there was only one person who Bei Longze made him jealous, and that was the Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse who went to the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

But that one hasn't come back for a long time, maybe he has given up Beilongze, what is there to be afraid of him.

"If you don't leave, let's stay here!"

Ye 25 days threatened.

"Dare to threaten us, beat him half to death, and then ask him for his secret!"

The Blood Ze Dao Lord said.

Rumble!!!!!!

Six half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses besieged Ye Tian and came.

But soon, their expressions changed drastically.

"Spear of the Sun!"

Ye Tian used this Eternal Dao Seed Secret Technique, urging the power of the Eternal Dao Body and the Eternal Dao Seed, and stabbed fiercely at one of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realms.

Burst!!!!!

The spear of the ruin sun pierced through everything, directly piercing the opponent's body.

In an instant, the opponent's body was shattered and killed in an instant.

And the attacks of the other five half-step Eternal Realm God Realms fell on Ye Tian's body, and they were all blocked by the Eternal Dao Secret Technique Ruin Sun Immortal Cover.

"What !!"

These five half-step Eternal Realm God Realms were shocked.

Ye Tian actually killed one of their half-step Eternal Realm God Realm companions in one move in seconds, what kind of strength is this.

"It's not good, run away!"

The Blood Ze Dao Lord shouted.

"Sunrise Domain!"

"Prison of the Sun!"

Ye Tian performed these two Eternal Dao Secret Techniques.

The Prison of the Sun has been expanding, covering this area.

Under the influence of the Ruin Sun Realm and the Ruin Sun Prison, it was difficult for these five half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses to shuttle away for a while.

But Ye Tian fought hard, and his moves were all killing moves, and he was ruthless.

Burst!

Another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse was killed by Ye Tian.

As time passed, these half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses were killed by Ye Tian one by one.

The strength of the Blood Ze Dao Lord was stronger, and he resisted Ye Tian's several moves but did not die.

However, he didn't last long.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, we have an Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse in Beilongze, if you kill me, you don't want to live!"

The Blood Ze Dao Lord said.

"I think that if you go back, you will find a way to contact that Eternal Realm God Realm to kill me, so it is safer to kill you. Ye Tian sneered.

The Blood Ze Dao Master was desperate, he really had this idea.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of his threat at all and vowed to kill him.

Thundered!!!!!

The Blood Ze Dao Master resisted again and again, but in the end he couldn't bear it.

Burst!!!!!

The body of the Blood Ze Dao Lord was pierced and shattered by the spear of the ruin sun, and finally fell and died.

After killing these six half-step Eternal Realm God Realms, Ye Tian erased the traces here.

Of course.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian's replica body is back, and he has brought back the Eternal Fire Vine.

Subsequently.

He gave the Eternal Fire Vine to his wife Xiao Yue, and Xiao Yue also gave the Spirit Devouring Demon Flower and the Evil Curse Vine to his daughter.

"I have to master the Eternal Demon Pillar as soon as possible, if I can completely control the Eternal Demon Pillar, then I don't have to be afraid of that Eternal Realm God Realm in Beilongze!" Ye Tian muttered.

At the beginning, the Demon Seed Abyss had not completely controlled the Eternal Demon Pillar, which was enough to deter the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods in the depths of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, so that the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods would not dare to enter.

And his strength is even more terrifying than the Demon Seed Linyuan, if he completely masters the Eternal Demon Pillar, I am afraid that he can kill the weaker Eternal Realm God Realm!

The years passed.

Ye Tian's other copy body has been secretly monitoring Bei Long Ze in the Lone Star Realm Alliance, and Bei Long Ze was indeed furious, but that Eternal Realm God Realm still hasn't returned.

I'm afraid that he won't come back anytime soon.

If he did come back, he would be the first to know.

If he didn't have the strength to deal with that Eternal Realm God Realm, he would have to give up the Endless Realm and the Star Realm directly, return to the Void Realm with the Terrans, and go into hiding.

So, he didn't panic at all.

......

Demon Seed No. 1 Abyss.

Bang!!!!!

The Eternals flickered.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was excited.

"Using a replica body to continuously sacrifice the Eternal Dao Seed to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar has achieved remarkable results, and it can finally easily make the Eternal Demon Pillar shake!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

You know, he couldn't make the Eternal Pillar move before, he could only use the power of the Eternal Pillar, but now he can shake the Eternal Pillar, this is progress!

"It shouldn't be too long before I can control this Eternal Pillar!"

670 Ye Tian looked forward to it.

He really wanted to know what kind of strength he would exert when he really took charge of the Eternal Demon Pillar, which was definitely more terrifying than the power of the Eternal Devouring Spear.

If he is armed with the Eternal Devouring Spear, the upper part of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm is almost invincible in half a step, but the threat to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm is limited, unless his own strength reaches the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, it is difficult to kill the Eternal Realm God Realm with the help of the Eternal Realm Devouring Spear.

But the Eternal Pillar is different, it contains terrifying power in itself!

At present, the Eternal Demon Pillar is the most precious treasure and weapon in Ye Tian's hands!

Time passes, long years pass.

The Pillar of Eternity shook more and more, and the day of complete control of the Pillar of Eternity was getting closer and closer.

Unconsciously, hundreds of millions of eternal solstice epochs have passed.

this day.

Bang!!!!!

The Eternal Demon Pillar was completely controlled by Ye Tian, and it was out of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and even caused the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss to tremble, and many Eternal Dao Realms in the outside world were worried, thinking that something was wrong with the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

Click!

The Eternal Demon Pillar continued to grow smaller as Ye Tian's mind moved, turning into a stick that fit his body.

"It's heavy, but it can be used!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At this moment, he is completely in control of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar that can be mobilized far exceeds the past.
